page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 48 dedicated physical cores with 48 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, this instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading, ensuring predictable performance for compute-intensive tasks. The system is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core.

The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and includes a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. It does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. This hardware profile offers high resource density and dedicated CPU allocation, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring consistent processing power without the overhead of shared-core architectures.

Suitable workloads for this configuration include general-purpose applications, web serving, database hosting, and CI/CD pipelines that benefit from dedicated physical cores and a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio.
